title: Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam
tagline: Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The main shrine of the Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam, dates to the period of the Early Cholas shaped in the form the back of an elephant, called Gajapristhakara.
overview.description: The main shrine of the Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam, dates to the period of the Early Cholas shaped in the form the back of an elephant, called Gajapristhakara. Shiva's vehicle Nandi faces East, away from the shrine. Subsidiary shrine on artificial hill, dedicated to Shiva as Shri Javanteeswarar. The Nandi faces East, with its back turned towards the shrine.

topPlaces.name: Pennadam Meikandar Temple
topPlaces.description: Pennadam Meikandar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Achuthakalappalarmedu at Pennadam in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Pennadam
topPlaces.description: Pennadam (Pen Aavu Kadam) is a panchayat town in Cuddalore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvattatthurai Theerthapurisvarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruvattatthurai Theerthapurisvarar Temple is a Shiva temple, located in Tiruvattatthurai (also known as Tirunelvayil Arattjurai, Tiruvaratthurai and Tiruvatturai), a village in Cuddalore district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is revered in the seventh-century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil saint poets known as the Nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (93 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (91 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam?
faq.a: Stays in Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sudarkozhundeeswarar Temple, Pennadam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pennadam Meikandar Temple, Pennadam, Alathiyur, Ariyalur, Adhanakurichi, Tiruvattatthurai Theerthapurisvarar Temple.
